title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ecom Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
